core_principles: Softness over sharpness: Use rounded corners (14-16px) and subtle shadows.
Calm Palette: Strict adherence to the sage green and off-white palette.
Clarity: High legibility with generous whitespace.
Professionalism: No emojis, only clean, stroke-based icons.

Sidebar.item_style: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 font-medium

Card.wrapper: bg-white dark:bg-[#242B29] rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-border/40
Card.title: text-lg font-semibold text-[#2F3A38] dark:text-[#E0E6E4]

Button.primary: bg-[#5F8D7E] hover:bg-[#4a7063] text-white shadow-md transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

Table.header: bg-[#F5F7F6] dark:bg-[#2C3331] text-xs font-semibold text-[#6B7C75] uppercase tracking-wider

Badge.default: bg-[#5F8D7E]/10 text-[#5F8D7E] px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full
Badge.success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400
Badge.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400
Badge.error: bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICTLY follow the color codes. Do not deviate.
Implement the Sidebar as a fixed left component.
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Add these via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
Ensure Dark Mode is togglable via a settings switch and persists in localStorage.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Do not use random external links.
Charts must use the primary and secondary colors (Sage greens).
Tables should have a clean, 'airy' look with generous padding.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
universal_guidelines: No gradients for backgrounds, only solid colors or subtle noise textures if essential.
Avoid generic 'Inter' font unless strictly necessary for data density.
Use 24px-32px padding for cards to maintain the 'Chic' aesthetic.
Buttons should not be 100% width unless on mobile.
Input fields should have a light background (#F0F2F1) to differentiate from the white card background.
